Parties: Najd Logistics Systems Co. (CJSC, CR: 101-XX-1234567-Z, Riyadh) and Dune Meridian Ventures SPC (KSA branch, CR: 701-YY-7654321-Q) agree on a minority strategic investment and supply JV.
Listing context: Issuer intends to seek listing on Tadawul (Nomu) within 12 months; this term sheet relies only on public announcements and contains no MNPI under CMA Market Conduct Regulations.
Structure: Subscription for new ordinary shares subject to CMA approval for capital increase; consideration ranges and valuation to be set in definitive agreements with no market-sensitive amounts stated herein.
Conditions precedent: CMA no-objection, GAC clearance where applicable, and internal PDPL readiness certification per compliance memo MEM-PDPL-2025-04.
Data Processing Addendum: Schedule KSA-PDPL-2 applies; processors will be onboarded via Form FRM-ONB-009 using role mailboxes only (e.g., privacy@najdlogistics.example) and generic contact points.
PII minimisation: onboarding collects only CR field, corporate contacts, and purpose of processing; National ID/Iqama fields are masked and not required unless expressly mandated by KYC law.
Retention: personal data processed under this transaction follows Retention Schedule PDPL-KSA-RS-01 (investor KYC files 5 years post-closing; onboarding logs 12 months), with earlier erasure where legal basis lapses.
Consent withdrawal: if an individual withdraws consent, records are flagged and processing is paused per SOP-PDPL-07; as of this term sheet there are no active withdrawals.
DSAR handling: requests are received via the privacy portal and triaged within 5 business days; no pending DSARs relate to this transaction and no delays are expected.
Completed event: one DSAR erasure request (Ref: DSAR-CLS-2025-044) concerning a former vendor contact was completed and logged, confirming deletion from onboarding repositories.
Cross-border transfer approval: APV-KSA-2025-117 was issued by SDAIA for export of pseudonymised KPI dashboards to a read-only EU analytics instance through 2026-12-31; no raw National ID/Iqama or CR data is included.
Issuer workflows: insider lists and blackout procedures are maintained by the issuer; no unpublished financials or forecasts will be shared with the investor prior to signing, and any Tadawul references are already public and stale.
Subprocessors and security: vendors listed in DPA Schedule Annex A (fictional services only) are located in-KSA; any addition requires prior written approval and completion of the CMA issuer security questionnaire.
Clarifications: references to cross-border transfer, consent withdrawal, DSAR, erasure, retention, and minimisation herein describe policy controls or completed events and should not be read as notice of a live privacy risk.
